citation: Luthey-Schulten Lab. Minimal_Cell_ComplexFormation: Spatially homogeneous whole-cell model (WCM) of the genetically minimal cell Syn3A, incorporating complex formation processes. GitHub repository.
notes: Source of the canonical Syn3A input data files used by cell_sim/layer0_genome/syn3a_real.py: syn3A.gb (CP016816.2), kinetic_params.xlsx, initial_concentrations.xlsx, complex_formation.xlsx, Syn3A_updated.xml. Published in JPC B 2024. Repo has no LICENSE file at the root as of staging (2026-04-21) - data is therefore kept local-only in cell_sim/data/Minimal_Cell_ComplexFormation/input_data/ and never committed to nikku03/cell (excluded by .gitignore 'data/' rule).
caveats: No explicit LICENSE file at repo root as of 2026-04-21; we treat the files as research-share and stage locally without redistribution.
Revision pin: file SHA-256s recorded in memory_bank/data/STAGING.md.
